title: I'M Not Sleepy
lyrics:
[verse 1]
My toes go wiggle-wig
My knees go bounce-bounce
The dog just licked my sock
*Splat!* Right on my pants!

[chorus]
I’m not sleepy, no way
I’m not sleepy, no sir
Not one little bit yet
You can’t make me—*grrr!*

[verse 2]
Blanket fell on the floor
Bear’s stuck in the chair
The clock goes tick-tock loud
*Crash!* Oh no—my bear!

[chorus]
I’m not sleepy, no way
I’m not sleepy, no sir
Not one little bit yet
You can’t make me—*grrr!*

[ending]
I’m not sleepy… maybe…
My eyes feel kind of heavy…
Okay… just one more hug…
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, xylophone and tambourine, 124 BPM, super bouncy, high energy, impossible to sit still, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
scene: The dim glow of the *Cars* nightlight flickers on the blue walls of your bedroom at 8:17 PM, as you clutch your *Elmo* blanket and kick your feet against the mattress—Mom just tucked you in and whispered, *"Close your eyes, sweetie."* You bolt upright, eyes wide, and declare, *"I'm not sleepy!"* before she even turns off the hallway light.
cover_description: A wide-eyed kid in dinosaur pajamas clutches a stuffed bear while a dog licks their sock, and a blanket splats on the floor.
